activation_definition: M9 SPARC A_gov_inferred cross-matched to computed THINGS H I moment-map disturbance proxies
claim_boundary: This is an external diagnostic using computed H I structure proxies and M9 activation transfer; it is not a direct refit of BDVR to THINGS rotation curves.
dataset: THINGS H I robust-weighted moment maps cross-matched to M9 SPARC
falsification_rules: The H I structure hypothesis is challenged if low_A_gov systems have no higher H I disturbance than high_A_gov systems.
primary_result: Cross-matched 8 THINGS galaxies to M9 SPARC. Spearman(S_HI_disturbance, A_gov_inferred)=-0.012; median low-A disturbance=0.525; median high-A disturbance=0.625.
warnings: Small cross-match sample; use as a pilot diagnostic rather than a manuscript-level validation claim.
Moment-map proxies are not tilted-ring warp/asymmetry measurements.
THINGS moment maps are external H I structure data; A_gov values come from the M9 SPARC branch.
